publicationstmt.publisher: Tamiment Library and Robert F. Wagner Labor Archives

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2026-03-09 17:27:08 UTC.

change.item: Materials rehoused and record updated for compliance with DACS and ACM Required Elements for Archival Description by Stacey Flatt

repository.corpname: Tamiment Library and Robert F. Wagner Labor Archives

physdesc.extent: in 1 folder in a shared small flat box and 1 folder in a shared manuscript box.

did.abstract: Anna Magid was a member and tenant of the Workers Colony Corporation in the Bronx in the 1930s. This collection contains Magid's Workers Colony Corporation stock certificate from 1932; photographs of Magid and Masha Sliptzin; a Bronx Jewish High School Yearbook from 1951; and a World War II Russion War Relief donation pin.
did.langmaterial: Materials are in English and Hebrew.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Materials were removed from a collection donated by Marcia Berstein. The accession number associated with this gift is 2008.059.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: This collection has not been arranged by an archivist. The materials are arranged in the order in which they were received from the donor.

bioghist.head: Biographical Note
bioghist.p: Anna Magid was a member and tenant of the United Workers Colony Corporation in the Bronx.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Identification of item, date; Anna Magid Papers; TAM 435; box number; folder number or item identifier; Tamiment Library/Robert F. Wagner Labor Archives, New York University.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Decisions regarding arrangement, description, and physical interventions for this collection prior to 2026 are unknown. In 2026 the material was placed in folders and housed in 2 shared boxes of appropriate sizes. The finding aid was updated for compliance with DACS and ACM Required Elements for Archival Description.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This collection contains material related to Anna Magid dating from the 1930s to the 1950s. A stock certificate for the Workers Colony Corporation in the Bronx is in Magid's name, dating from 1932. Photographs in this collection include an undated portrait of Magid, as well as photographs of Masha Sliptzin (later Bernstein) as a child and also graduating from City College. A Bronx Jewish high school yearbook printed in Hewbrew with an entry for Sliptzin is dated from 1951. This collection also includes a World War II bear pin given for donating to the Russian War Relief effort.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Tamiment Library and Robert F. Wagner Labor Archive has no information about copyright ownership for this collection and is not authorized to grant permission to publish or reproduce materials from it. Materials in this collection, which were created in circa 1930-1955, are expected to enter the public domain in 2075.

controlaccess.subject: Housing, Cooperative -- New York (State) -- New York.

did.unittitle: Photographs, Russian War Relief Pin, and Bronx Jewish High School Yearbook
